title: orobanche barbata var. crithmi-maritimi
intro: Orobanche barbata var. crithmi-maritimi, a parasitic plant species, is a type of broomrape that belongs to the Orobanchaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a purgative and to reduce fever, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Orobanche barbata var. crithmi-maritimi include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in combination with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that are used to treat a range of health conditions.
